# Transcrição: Simple_Tip_To_Reduce_Nerves_BEFORE_A_Presentation

- **Fonte:** Simple_Tip_To_Reduce_Nerves_BEFORE_A_Presentation
- **Duração:** 01:21
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:21]

This is a brilliant technique. If you feel a lot of nerves, one thing you can do is you can walk the stage. So come to the presentation or the event or the keynote that you're doing and just walk the stage. And just get really comfortable with the space. A big part of feeling nervous comes from being unfamiliar and if you don't know what the stage is going to look like, you don't know how big the stage is. Do you know what your default are doing? Your default to this. And this is terrible. And most of the times people get stuck to the podium, not because they're not confident, but rather just because the space is unfamiliar. So when we're unfamiliar with the space, we tend to default and stand at the podium. But once you become familiar with the stage, you walk to the furthest corner on stage left. And then afterwards, you start to get a bit of a feel. And also what people don't realize is as you become more comfortable with the stage, when you go on stage, you'll actually use the stage. Otherwise, another big problem that people tend to face is when they don't walk the stage and they're not comfortable with the stage, they might just come to the middle. And when they do their presentation, they just stay in one spot the entire time. While this can be powerful, it's more powerful to use the entire stage.
